articles.title: Ukraine's GUR claims strike on Russian landing ships in Sevastopol Bay
articles.description: Ukraine's military intelligence unit claimed attacks on two Russian landing ships and a radar station in Sevastopol Bay in Russian-occupied Crimea on April 20.

articles.title: Ukraine strikes Tuapse oil refinery for second time in three days
articles.description: Ukrainian drones targeted the port of Tuapse, killing at least one person and damaging transport infrastructure. The strike was the second on the port in three days.

articles.title: Russian attacks kill 6, injure 59 across Ukraine in 24 hours
articles.description: Russian attacks killed six people and injured 59 others across Ukraine over the past day as of April 21, according to local authorities.

articles.title: Ukrainian drone strike hits Samara oil hub overnight
articles.description: Ukraine says drones struck a key oil distribution hub in Russia's Samara Oblast overnight, sparking a fire. President Zelensky warned that sanctions relief is fueling Russia's war ambitions.

articles.title: Zelensky expresses doubts about peace talks in Moscow-Kyiv meeting
articles.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky voiced doubts about peace talks, stating it would be disrespectful to meet in Moscow without visiting Kyiv first, as expected U.S. meetings with Witkoff and Kushner approach.

articles.title: Russian Defense Ministry reports control of Veterinary village in Kharkiv
articles.description: Russian Defense Ministry reported that Group of troops North established control over the village of Veterinary in Kharkiv region as of April 21, 2026.

articles.title: Russian forces advance in Kursk Oblast
articles.description: Russian forces recently advanced in Kursk Oblast. Russian forces also launched 236 drones against Ukraine on April 19, 2026.

articles.title: Russian Defense Ministry claims territorial gains near Donetsk
articles.description: Russian milbloggers claimed Russian forces seized Viroliubivka north of Kostiantynivka and villages of Dobropillia and Svyatopetrivka north of Huliaipole in mid-April 2026.

articles.title: Russia deploys new Geran-5 jet-powered drone with 1,000 km range
articles.description: Russia deployed a new jet-powered drone called Geran-5 carrying a 90 kg warhead with 1,000 km strike range, air-launched by Su-25 aircraft, according to Ukrainian military intelligence.

articles.title: Russian forces conduct recruitment decree with mandatory quotas
articles.description: Ryazan Oblast governor signed decree requiring companies to nominate military service candidates: 300-employee firms nominate 2 candidates, 500-employee firms nominate 5 candidates by September 20, 2026.
